payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE: cloud middleware now accepts session JWT or per-user API key (no shared token / no loopback bypass when enabled); req.principal carries accountId + claims tenant_id/role; safe-rollout gate keeps local + un-provisioned cloud unchanged. REMAINING (why in_review): workspace resolution still reads ?workspace/X-Scope-Workspace; deriving the tenant strictly from claims + dropping header trust needs the account->workspace mapping (ties into SCP-124 RLS). Tracked as a follow-up.
